summary: Implemented startup first-work orientation in the agent launcher. Launch packets now append a read-only task/work orientation step after identity hydration and checkpoint continuity. Explicit handoffs are supplied with --startup-task and emit narada_task_read for the concrete task; generic launches use narada_task_work_next with claim=false. Builder2 coverage verifies explicit task 1406 handoff, no silent claim, and no publish/deploy authority.

verification.result: passed: packet includes narada_task_read task_number 1406 and startup_first_work_orientation explicit_task_handoff with claim_attempted false

residuals: MCP startup affordance agent_context_startup_sequence still hydrates continuity; first-work orientation is carried in the launch packet startup_sequence for the carrier to execute through narada_task_read or narada_task_work_next. A future MCP-native startup sequence executor could execute the declared steps directly.
